headline: Dow Jones Futures Fall With U.S. Markets Shut; Nvidia Leads 5 Stocks Near Buy Points, SpaceX Needs This
summary: Dow Jones futures fell slightly Friday, along with S&P 500 futures and Nasdaq futures. U.S. stock markets will be closed for the Juneteenth holiday. The stock market rebounded this past week, though the gains were concentrated in chips and AI-related plays, along with biotechs.

headline: FedEx (FDX) Expands Asia Cargo Ties And Restores Vietnam Operations
summary: FedEx (NYSE:FDX) has entered a partnership with China Southern Air Logistics to expand air cargo connectivity in the Asia Pacific region. The company has reported operational recovery in Vietnam after recent service disruptions affected customers in Southeast Asia. Together, these developments increase FedEx capacity to support cross border trade flows across key Asian markets. FedEx sits at the center of global air and ground shipping, and its network decisions can shape how quickly goods...

headline: How the Rich Spread the Risk
summary: More rich Americans are seeking residency and citizenship programs abroad than any other nationality, says Basil Mohr-Elzeki, head of private clients Americas at London migration specialist Henley & Partners.  Demand from U.S. clients nearly doubled last year.  Henley notes in a report that nearly half its U.S. clients are pursuing European programs—led by Portugal and Italy—while others are split between Latin America and the Caribbean, which offer quicker paths.
